summary: Iteration 53: Lifecycle Dashboard Tab fully verified. All 16 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: Lifecycle (2) tab visible with candidate count, MODE TAG ONLY badge with threshold config shown, 4 summary cards (Exit Candidates=2, Avg Profit Multiple=5.51x, Avg Current Edge=0bp, Avg Edge Decay=0%), Exit Reason Distribution bars for all 5 reasons (profit_capture showing 2), Resolution Time Breakdown showing 54 positions in 'unknown' with 2 exits, Price Multiple Distribution histogram visible, Shadow Exit Timeline placeholder for tag_only mode, Would Have Sold vs Held table with 2 rows and correct columns, Aggregate by Exit Reason card for profit_capture.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 verified Lifecycle Dashboard Tab for weather strategies. Key findings: (1) Dashboard at /api/positions/weather/lifecycle/dashboard returns 8 sections: summary, reason_distribution, time_buckets, shadow_exits, sold_vs_held, sold_vs_held_by_reason, profit_distribution, config. (2) Currently 54 weather positions evaluated with 2 exit candidates (both profit_capture at 5.51x avg). (3) All 54 positions are in 'unknown' time bucket because they are legacy positions without resolution timestamps. (4) Shadow exits list is empty because mode is tag_only (not shadow_exit). (5) sold_vs_held table shows comparison data with Flag Price, Now, Sim Exit PnL, Held PnL, Delta, Verdict columns. (6) Aggregate by Exit Reason aggregates the comparison by reason type. (7) Frontend tab shows candidate count in label, MODE badge with inline threshold config. (8) Previous lifecycle features still work: exit-candidates, lifecycle, positions/by-strategy enrichment.
